Looking at this task, I need to create a CUDA extension for the Hinge Loss computation: `torch.mean(torch.clamp(1 - predictions * targets, min=0))`

This involves:

2. Summation for the mean

Let me create optimized CUDA kernels and bindings:

### CUDA_KERNELS
```cpp
// kernels/hinge_loss.cu
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Main kernel: computes clamped values and partial sums
__global__ void hinge_loss_kernel(
    const float* __restrict__ predictions,
    const float* __restrict__ targets,
    float* __restrict__ partial_sums,
    const int size
) {
    extern __shared__ float sdata[];
    
    unsigned int tid = threadIdx.x;
    unsigned int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    
    // Compute clamped value for this element
    float val = 0.0f;
    if (idx < size) {
        float prod = predictions[idx] * targets[idx];
        float hinge = 1.0f - prod;
        val = (hinge > 0.0f) ? hinge : 0.0f;
    }
    
    sdata[tid] = val;
    __syncthreads();
    
    // Parallel reduction (Cooperative Groups style)
    for (unsigned int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 32; s >>= 1) {
        if (tid < s) {
            sdata[tid] += sdata[tid + s];
        }
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Warp-level reduction (no sync needed within warp)
    if (tid < 32) {
        volatile float* smem = sdata;
        if (blockDim.x >= 64) smem[tid] += smem[tid + 32];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 16];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 8];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 4];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 2];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 1];
    }
    
    // Write block sum to global memory
    if (tid == 0) {
        partial_sums[blockIdx.x] = sdata[0];
    }
}

// Second kernel: reduce partial sums to final result
__global__ void reduce_hinge_loss_kernel(
    const float* __restrict__ partial_sums,
    float* __restrict__ output,
    const int num_blocks
) {
    extern __shared__ float sdata[];
    
    unsigned int tid = threadIdx.x;
    unsigned int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    
    // Load partial sums
    float val = 0.0f;
    if (idx < num_blocks) {
        val = partial_sums[idx];
    }
    
    sdata[tid] = val;
    __syncthreads();
    
    // Parallel reduction
    for (unsigned int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 32; s >>= 1) {
        if (tid < s) {
            sdata[tid] += sdata[tid + s];
        }
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Warp-level reduction
    if (tid < 32) {
        volatile float* smem = sdata;
        if (blockDim.x >= 64) smem[tid] += smem[tid + 32];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 16];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 8];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 4];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 2];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 1];
    }
    
    if (tid == 0) {
        output[0] = sdata[0];
    }
}

// Launcher functions
extern "C" void hinge_loss_launcher(
    const float* predictions,
    const float* targets,
    float* output,
    int size,
    cudaStream_t stream
) {
    const int block_size = 256;
    const int grid_size = (size + block_size - 1) / block_size;
    const int shared_mem = block_size * sizeof(float);
    
    // Allocate temporary memory for partial sums
    static float* partial_sums = nullptr;
    static int partial_sums_size = 0;
    
    if (partial_sums_size < grid_size * sizeof(float)) {
        if (partial_sums) cudaFree(partial_sums);
        cudaMalloc(&partial_sums, grid_size * sizeof(float));
        partial_sums_size = grid_size * sizeof(float);
    }
    
    // First kernel: compute partial sums
    hinge_loss_kernel<<<grid_size, block_size, shared_mem, stream>>>(
        predictions, targets, partial_sums, size
    );
    
    // Second kernel: reduce to final result
    const int reduce_grid = 1;
    const int reduce_block = min(256, grid_size);
    const int reduce_shared = reduce_block * sizeof(float);
    
    reduce_hinge_loss_kernel<<<reduce_grid, reduce_block, reduce_shared, stream>>>(
        partial_sums, output, grid_size
    );
}
```

```cpp
// kernels/hinge_loss_binding.cpp
#include <torch/types.h>
#include <torch/csrc/utils/pybind.h>

#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <c10/cuda/CUDAStream.h>
#include "../binding_registry.h"

// Declare launcher from .cu file
extern "C" void hinge_loss_launcher(
    const float* predictions,
    const float* targets,
    float* output,
    int size,
    cudaStream_t stream
);

torch::Tensor hinge_loss_forward(torch::Tensor predictions, torch::Tensor targets) {
    // Input validation
    TORCH_CHECK(predictions.is_cuda(), "Predictions must be a CUDA tensor");
    TORCH_CHECK(targets.is_cuda(), "Targets must be a CUDA tensor");
    TORCH_CHECK(predictions.is_contiguous(), "Predictions must be contiguous");
    TORCH_CHECK(targets.is_contiguous(), "Targets must be contiguous");
    TORCH_CHECK(predictions.dtype() == torch::kFloat32, "Predictions must be float32");
    TORCH_CHECK(targets.dtype() == torch::kFloat32, "Targets must be float32");
    TORCH_CHECK(predictions.sizes() == targets.sizes(), "Predictions and targets must have same shape");
    
    int size = predictions.numel();
    
    // Allocate output scalar tensor
    auto output = torch::empty({1}, predictions.options());
    
    // Get current CUDA stream
    cudaStream_t stream = c10::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream().stream();
    
    // Launch the custom kernel
    hinge_loss_launcher(
        predictions.data_ptr<float>(),
        targets.data_ptr<float>(),
        output.data_ptr<float>(),
        size,
        stream
    );
    
    // Compute mean by dividing by batch size
    return output / static_cast<float>(size);
}

void register_hinge_loss(pybind11::module& m) {
    m.def("hinge_loss_forward", &hinge_loss_forward, 
          "Hinge loss forward",
          py::arg("predictions"),
          py::arg("targets"));
}

REGISTER_BINDING(hinge_loss, register_hinge_loss);
```

```cpp
// kernels/hinge_loss.cu
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Vectorized load using float4 for better memory bandwidth
struct float4 {
    float x, y, z, w;
};

// Vectorized kernel for large tensors with broadcasting support
template <bool broadcast_targets>
__global__ void hinge_loss_kernel(
    const float* __restrict__ predictions,
    const float* __restrict__ targets,
    float* __restrict__ output,
    const int pred_rows,
    const int pred_cols,
    const int target_stride
) {
    extern __shared__ float sdata[];
    
    const int tid = threadIdx.x;
    const int wid = tid >> 5;         // Warp ID
    const int lane = tid & 31;        // Lane ID
    
    // Grid-stride loop for processing
    for (int row = blockIdx.x; row < pred_rows; row += gridDim.x) {
        const int target_row = broadcast_targets ? 0 : row;
        
        for (int col = blockIdx.y * blockDim.x + tid; col < pred_cols; col += gridDim.y * blockDim.x) {
            // Vectorized load for predictions (4 elements at once)
            const int col4 = col & ~3;
            const int pred_idx = row * pred_cols + col4;
            
            float4 pred_vec;
            if (col + 3 < pred_cols) {
                // Aligned load
                *((float4*)&pred_vec) = *((float4*)(predictions + pred_idx));
            } else {
                // Scalar fallback for edge elements
                pred_vec.x = (col < pred_cols) ? predictions[pred_idx] : 0.0f;
                pred_vec.y = (col + 1 < pred_cols) ? predictions[pred_idx + 1] : 0.0f;
                pred_vec.z = (col + 2 < pred_cols) ? predictions[pred_idx + 2] : 0.0f;
                pred_vec.w = (col + 3 < pred_cols) ? predictions[pred_idx + 3] : 0.0f;
            }
            
            // Load targets with broadcasting
            float target_val = targets[target_row * target_stride + (col & ~3) + 0];
            float target_val1 = targets[target_row * target_stride + (col & ~3) + 1];
            float target_val2 = targets[target_row * target_stride + (col & ~3) + 2];
            float target_val3 = targets[target_row * target_stride + (col & ~3) + 3];
            
            // Compute hinge loss with unrolled operations
            float h0 = 1.0f - pred_vec.x * target_val;
            float h1 = 1.0f - pred_vec.y * target_val1;
            float h2 = 1.0f - pred_vec.z * target_val2;
            float h3 = 1.0f - pred_vec.w * target_val3;
            
            // Clamp (inline max for speed)
            float c0 = h0 > 0.0f ? h0 : 0.0f;
            float c1 = h1 > 0.0f ? h1 : 0.0f;
            float c2 = h2 > 0.0f ? h2 : 0.0f;
            float c3 = h3 > 0.0f ? h3 : 0.0f;
            
            // Store to shared memory
            int smem_idx = tid;
            sdata[smem_idx] = c0;
            if (col + 1 < pred_cols) sdata[smem_idx + 32] = c1;
            if (col + 2 < pred_cols) sdata[smem_idx + 64] = c2;
            if (col + 3 < pred_cols) sdata[smem_idx + 96] = c3;
            
            __syncthreads();
            
            // Parallel reduction in shared memory
            #pragma unroll
            for (int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 32; s >>= 1) {
                if (tid < s) {
                    sdata[tid] += sdata[tid + s];
                }
                __syncthreads();
            }
            
            // Warp-level reduction using shuffle
            float sum = 0.0f;
            if (tid < 32) {
                // First warp accumulates
                float warp_sum = sdata[tid];
                warp_sum += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, warp_sum, 16);
                warp_sum += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, warp_sum, 8);
                warp_sum += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, warp_sum, 4);
                warp_sum += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, warp_sum, 2);
                warp_sum += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, warp_sum, 1);
                
                if (lane == 0) {
                    sdata[wid] = warp_sum;
                }
            }
            __syncthreads();
            
            // Write block result
            if (tid == 0) {
                atomicAdd(output, sdata[wid]);
            }
            __syncthreads();
        }
    }
}

// Launcher with proper configuration
extern "C" void hinge_loss_launcher(
    const float* predictions,
    const float* targets,
    float* output,
    int pred_rows,
    int pred_cols,
    int target_stride,
    int broadcast_targets,
    cudaStream_t stream
) {
    // Initialize output to 0
    cudaMemsetAsync(output, 0, sizeof(float), stream);
    
    // Configure launch parameters
    const int block_dim = 128;  // 4 warps
    dim3 block(block_dim);
    dim3 grid(min(pred_rows, 64), min((pred_cols + block_dim - 1) / block_dim, 64));
    
    const int shared_mem = block_dim * sizeof(float);
    
    if (broadcast_targets) {
        hinge_loss_kernel<true><<<grid, block, shared_mem, stream>>>(
            predictions, targets, output, pred_rows, pred_cols, target_stride
        );
    } else {
        hinge_loss_kernel<false><<<grid, block, shared_mem, stream>>>(
            predictions, targets, output, pred_rows, pred_cols, target_stride
        );
    }
}
```

```cpp
// kernels/hinge_loss_binding.cpp
#include <torch/types.h>
#include <torch/csrc/utils/pybind.h>

#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <c10/cuda/CUDAStream.h>
#include "../binding_registry.h"

extern "C" void hinge_loss_launcher(
    const float* predictions,
    const float* targets,
    float* output,
    int pred_rows,
    int pred_cols,

    int broadcast_targets,

torch::Tensor hinge_loss_forward(torch::Tensor predictions, torch::Tensor targets) {
    TORCH_CHECK(predictions.is_cuda(), "Predictions must be a CUDA tensor");
    TORCH_CHECK(targets.is_cuda(), "Targets must be a CUDA tensor");
    TORCH_CHECK(predictions.dtype() == torch::kFloat32, "Predictions must be float32");
    TORCH_CHECK(targets.dtype() == torch::kFloat32, "Targets must be float32");
    
    auto pred_sizes = predictions.sizes();
    auto target_sizes = targets.sizes();
    
    int pred_dims = pred_sizes.size();
    int target_dims = target_sizes.size();
    
    // Compute broadcasting dimensions
    int pred_rows = 1, pred_cols = 1;
    int target_stride = 1;
    bool broadcast_targets = false;
    
    if (pred_dims == 2 && target_dims == 1) {
        // predictions: (M, N), targets: (N,) - broadcast along M dimension
        pred_rows = pred_sizes[0];
        pred_cols = pred_sizes[1];
        target_stride = target_sizes[0];
        broadcast_targets = true;
    } else if (pred_dims == 1 && target_dims == 1) {
        // Both 1D - element-wise
        pred_rows = 1;
        pred_cols = pred_sizes[0];
        target_stride = target_sizes[0];
        broadcast_targets = false;
    } else if (pred_dims == 2 && target_dims == 2) {
        pred_rows = pred_sizes[0];
        pred_cols = pred_sizes[1];
        target_stride = target_sizes[1];
        broadcast_targets = false;
    } else {
        // Fallback to default case
        pred_rows = predictions.numel();
        pred_cols = 1;
        target_stride = targets.numel();
        broadcast_targets = (target_dims == 1);
    }
    
    // Allocate scalar output
    auto output = torch::zeros({1}, predictions.options());
    
    cudaStream_t stream = c10::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream().stream();
    
    hinge_loss_launcher(
        predictions.data_ptr<float>(),
        targets.data_ptr<float>(),
        output.data_ptr<float>(),
        pred_rows,
        pred_cols,
        target_stride,
        broadcast_targets ? 1 : 0,
        stream
    );
    
    // Compute mean
    int total_elements = predictions.numel();
    return output / static_cast<float>(total_elements);
}

void register_hinge_loss(pybind11::module& m) {
    m.def("hinge_loss_forward", &hinge_loss_forward, 
          "Hinge loss forward",
          py::arg("predictions"),
          py::arg("targets"));
}

REGISTER_BINDING(hinge_loss, register_hinge_loss);
```

```cpp
    dim3 block(block_dim);
    dim3 grid(min(pred_rows, 256), min(grid_y, 256));
    
    const int shared_mem = block_dim * 4 * sizeof(float);  // 4 values per thread
    
    if (broadcast_targets) {

            predictions, targets, output, pred_rows, pred_cols, target_stride

    }
}
```

```cpp
torch::Tensor hinge_loss_forward(torch::Tensor predictions, torch::Tensor targets) {
    TORCH_CHECK(predictions.is_cuda(), "Predictions must be a CUDA tensor");
    TORCH_CHECK(targets.is_cuda(), "Targets must be a CUDA tensor");
    TORCH_CHECK(predictions.dtype() == torch::kFloat32, "Predictions must be float32");
    TORCH_CHECK(targets.dtype() == torch::kFloat32, "Targets must be float32");
    
    auto pred_sizes = predictions.sizes();
    auto target_sizes = targets.sizes();
    
    int pred_dims = pred_sizes.size();
    int target_dims = target_sizes.size();
    
    // Compute dimensions with broadcasting support
    int pred_rows, pred_cols, target_stride;
    bool broadcast_targets = false;
    
    if (pred_dims == 2 && target_dims == 1) {
        // predictions: (M, N), targets: (N,) - broadcast along M dimension
        pred_rows = pred_sizes[0];
        pred_cols = pred_sizes[1];
        target_stride = target_sizes[0];
        broadcast_targets = true;
    } else if (pred_dims == 1 && target_dims == 1) {
        pred_rows = 1;
        pred_cols = pred_sizes[0];
        target_stride = target_sizes[0];
    } else if (pred_dims == 2 && target_dims == 2) {
        pred_rows = pred_sizes[0];
        pred_cols = pred_sizes[1];
        target_stride = target_sizes[1];
    } else {
        // Fallback
        pred_rows = predictions.numel();
        pred_cols = 1;
        target_stride = targets.numel();
        broadcast_targets = (target_dims == 1);
    }
    
    // Allocate scalar output
    auto output = torch::zeros({1}, predictions.options());
    
    cudaStream_t stream = c10::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream().stream();
    
    hinge_loss_launcher(
        predictions.data_ptr<float>(),
        targets.data_ptr<float>(),
        output.data_ptr<float>(),
        pred_rows,
        pred_cols,
        target_stride,
        broadcast_targets ? 1 : 0,
        stream
    );
    
    // Compute mean
    int total_elements = predictions.numel();
    return output / static_cast<float>(total_elements);
}

void register_hinge_loss(pybind11::module& m) {
    m.def("hinge_loss_forward", &hinge_loss_forward, 
          "Hinge loss forward",
          py::arg("predictions"),
          py::arg("targets"));
}
```

```cpp
    int target_dims = target_sizes.size();
    
    int pred_rows, pred_cols, target_stride;
    bool broadcast_targets = false;
    
    if (pred_dims == 2 && target_dims == 1) {
        pred_rows = pred_sizes[0];
        pred_cols = pred_sizes[1];
        target_stride = target_sizes[0];
        broadcast_targets = true;
    } else if (pred_dims == 1 && target_dims == 1) {
        pred_rows = 1;
        pred_cols = pred_sizes[0];
        target_stride = target_sizes[0];
    } else if (pred_dims == 2 && target_dims == 2) {
        pred_rows = pred_sizes[0];
        pred_cols = pred_sizes[1];
        target_stride = target_sizes[1];
    } else {
        pred_rows = predictions.numel();
        pred_cols = 1;
        target_stride = targets.numel();
        broadcast_targets = (target_dims == 1);
    }
    
    // Use empty with scalar shape {} instead of {1}
    auto output = torch::empty({}, predictions.options());
    
    cudaStream_t stream = c10::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream().stream();

        predictions.data_ptr<float>(),
        targets.data_ptr<float>(),
        output.data_ptr<float>(),
        pred_rows,
        pred_cols,
        target_stride,
        broadcast_targets ? 1 : 0,
        stream
    );
    
    // Compute mean - using in-place division
    int total_elements = predictions.numel();
    *output.data_ptr<float>() /= static_cast<float>(total_elements);
    
    return output;
}
```

### CUDA_KERNELS
```cpp
// kernels/hinge_loss.cu
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Single pass: compute and reduce with grid-stride loops
__global__ void hinge_loss_kernel(
    const float* __restrict__ predictions,
    const float* __restrict__ targets,
    float* __restrict__ partial_sums,
    const int size
) {
    extern __shared__ float sdata[];
    
    const int tid = threadIdx.x;
    const int block_offset = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x;
    
    // Each thread initializes its shared memory slot
    sdata[tid] = 0.0f;
    
    // Grid-stride loop to cover all elements
    for (int i = block_offset + tid; i < size; i += blockDim.x * gridDim.x) {
        float prod = predictions[i] * targets[i];
        float hinge = 1.0f - prod;
        float clamped = fmaxf(0.0f, hinge);
        sdata[tid] += clamped;
    }
    __syncthreads();
    
    // Parallel reduction in shared memory
    for (unsigned int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 32; s >>= 1) {
        if (tid < s) {
            sdata[tid] += sdata[tid + s];
        }
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Warp-level reduction
    if (tid < 32) {
        volatile float* smem = sdata;
        float val = smem[tid];
        
        if (blockDim.x >= 64) val += smem[tid + 32];
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 16);
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 8);
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 4);
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 2);
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 1);
        
        if (tid == 0) {
            partial_sums[blockIdx.x] = val;
        }
    }
}

// Final reduction kernel
__global__ void reduce_sum_kernel(
    const float* __restrict__ partial_sums,
    float* __restrict__ output,
    const int num_blocks
) {
    extern __shared__ float sdata[];
    
    const int tid = threadIdx.x;
    const int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    
    // Load partial sums
    float val = 0.0f;
    if (idx < num_blocks) {
        val = partial_sums[idx];
    }
    sdata[tid] = val;
    __syncthreads();
    
    // Reduction
    for (unsigned int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 32; s >>= 1) {
        if (tid < s) {
            sdata[tid] += sdata[tid + s];
        }
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    if (tid < 32) {
        volatile float* smem = sdata;
        float val = smem[tid];
        
        if (blockDim.x >= 64) val += smem[tid + 32];
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 16);
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 8);
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 4);
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 2);
        val += __shfl_down_sync(0xffffffff, val, 1);
        
        if (tid == 0) {
            output[0] = val;
        }
    }
}

// Launcher
extern "C" void hinge_loss_launcher(
    const float* predictions,
    const float* targets,
    float* output,
    int size,
    cudaStream_t stream
) {
    const int block_size = 256;
    const int grid_size = min((size + block_size - 1) / block_size, 256);
    
    // Allocate temp buffer for partial sums
    static float* partial_sums = nullptr;
    static int partial_sums_size = 0;
    
    if (partial_sums_size < grid_size * sizeof(float)) {
        if (partial_sums) cudaFree(partial_sums);
        cudaMalloc(&partial_sums, grid_size * sizeof(float));
        partial_sums_size = grid_size * sizeof(float);
    }
    
    // First kernel: compute and reduce to partial sums
    hinge_loss_kernel<<<grid_size, block_size, block_size * sizeof(float), stream>>>(
        predictions, targets, partial_sums, size
    );
    
    // Second kernel: reduce partial sums to final result
    reduce_sum_kernel<<<1, min(256, grid_size), min(256, grid_size) * sizeof(float), stream>>>(
        partial_sums, output, grid_size
    );
}
```
